title: Debug stick crafting
description: This pack adds a simple way to craft the debug stick in survival, which is great for those who wanna create detailed builds.
body:
# Crafting recipe for debug stick 
This pack adds a simple way to craft the core **Debug stick** in survival. 
For the crafting recipe you'll need some lapis and a stick. Combine them and you're good to go. Happy detailing!![Crafting recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ef72c81a4c0c9d6019253a34b3a873a97cef3b6b.png)
